description: A customer made a payment without any remittance advice, and it's sitting in the system as unapplied cash. An AR specialist needs to identify which invoice(s) it should be applied to.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the details of the unapplied payment, including the customer and the amount.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies a payment of $5,678 from a specific customer.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve a list of all open invoices for that customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets a list of the customer's open invoices.

nodes.task_description: Look for an open invoice or a combination of invoices that exactly matches the payment amount.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds a single open invoice for $5,678.

nodes.task_description: Apply the cash to the identified invoice.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully applies the payment and closes the invoice.
